mapper.select:
SELECT count(*) FROM bnc_company company, bnc_biz_category cate WHERE company.cmpy_biz_code = cate.bizc_code
AND cate.${searchType} like '%'||#{searchKeyword}||'%'
SELECT * FROM bnc_company order by cmpy_rdate desc
SELECT * FROM bnc_company c, bnc_biz_category b WHERE c.cmpy_biz_code = b.bizc_code and cmpy_biznum = #{cmpy_biznum}
